schema.description: The Schema describing the layout of the 3LC object

type.description: The type name of the class

created.description: The datetime of the object creation

serialization_version.description: The serialization version of the object

transaction_id.description: The transaction associated with this object

is_url_writable.description: Whether the URL where the object is stored is writable.

row_cache_url.description: An optional URL referring to a cached version of all rows within this table

row_cache_populated.description: Whether 'row_cache_url' refers to a cached version of all rows within this table

dataset_name.description: The name of the dataset that this table belongs to

project_name.description: The name of the project that this table belongs to

override_table_rows_schema.description: A schema describing potentially sparse overrides for the base schema

row_count.description: The number of rows within this table (if known).

-1.0.description: The table hasn't produced its rows yet, and so the row count is still unknown

input_tables.description: Which input tables have been used to produce the table.

rows.description: A property containing the table rows within this Parquet table

weight.description: The weights of the samples in this table.
